description: Presentation management: create, update, add slides, and manage Google Slides presentations

name: slides_get
description: Get the content and structure of a Google Slides presentation.

name: slides_create
description: Create a new Google Slides presentation.

name: slides_add_slide
description: Add a new slide to a Google Slides presentation.

layout.description: Slide layout: BLANK, CAPTION_ONLY, TITLE, TITLE_AND_BODY, TITLE_AND_TWO_COLUMNS, TITLE_ONLY, SECTION_HEADER, SECTION_TITLE_AND_DESCRIPTION, ONE_COLUMN_TEXT, MAIN_POINT, BIG_NUMBER (default: BLANK)

insertion_index.description: Position to insert the slide (0 = beginning, default: end)

name: slides_get_text
description: Extract all text content from a Google Slides presentation.

name: slides_batch_update
description: Apply updates to a Google Slides presentation (advanced).

requests.description: Array of update request objects (Google Slides API format)

name: slides_delete_slide
description: Delete a slide from a Google Slides presentation.
